query: SELECT f.id, f.name, COUNT(fi.id) as ingredient_count FROM formulas f LEFT JOIN formula_ingredients fi ON f.id = fi.formulaId GROUP BY f.id ORDER BY ingredient_count DESC LIMIT 5;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4W3DGjM8p88cMXG.root --database XdWHm4xfoyiJjMtyZcmYpw --execute SELECT f.id, f.name, COUNT(fi.id) as ingredient_count FROM formulas f LEFT JOIN formula_ingredients fi ON f.id = fi.formulaId GROUP BY f.id ORDER BY ingredient_count DESC LIMIT 5;

rows.name: Body Spray - Morning tea on a summer vacation

stdout:
id	name	ingredient_count
60001	Perfume - California morning rain	6
1	Test Amber Accord	1
2	Love	1
30001	Body Spray - Morning tea on a summer vacation	1
